author: ggreg
text: Add a class to wrap TLS authentication

author: ggreg
text: [`prestodb.auth`](https://github.com/prestodb/presto-python-client/blob/master/prestodb/auth.py) provides an interface to setup authentication in the client. It currently defines the `Authentication` abstract interface and `KerberosAuthentication`. The purpose of this issue is to add a class to setup TLS client authentication.
